tasks.title: Implement custom autograd functions

plan.theme: End-to-End ML Pipeline Orchestration with MLflow

tasks.title: Define and log pipeline stages
tasks.description: Define and log pipeline stages

tasks.title: Build a production tracking pipeline
tasks.description: Build a production tracking pipeline

tasks.title: Install PyTorch & Explore Core Concepts
tasks.description: Install PyTorch with CUDA support. Learn about tensors, basic operations (creation, indexing, slicing, reshaping), and automatic differentiation (autograd). Compare with NumPy arrays.

tasks.title: Build a Simple Linear Regression Model
tasks.description: Implement a linear regression model from scratch using PyTorch tensors and autograd. Manually define forward pass, loss (MSE), and use gradient descent to train on synthetic data.

tasks.title: Mini-Project: Predict House Prices
tasks.description: Load a small dataset (e.g., Boston Housing from sklearn). Preprocess with Pandas, convert to tensors. Train your linear regression model, plot predictions vs actuals, and calculate RMSE.

tasks.title: Learn torch.nn Module & Common Layers
tasks.description: Study nn.Module, nn.Sequential, Linear, ReLU, Dropout, etc. Understand parameter initialization and moving models to GPU.

tasks.title: Implement a Feedforward Network for Classification
tasks.description: Build a multi-layer perceptron (MLP) using nn.Module for MNIST digit classification. Use CrossEntropyLoss and Adam optimizer.

tasks.title: Mini-Project: MNIST Digit Classifier
tasks.description: Train your MLP on MNIST dataset. Split into train/val, track accuracy/loss per epoch, and achieve >95% test accuracy. Visualize some misclassified examples.

tasks.title: Study Convolutional Layers & Popular Architectures
tasks.description: Learn Conv2d, MaxPool2d, BatchNorm2d. Review CNN architectures like LeNet, ResNet blocks. Understand image data loading with torchvision.

tasks.title: Build and Train a CNN on CIFAR-10
tasks.description: Implement a CNN (e.g., 2-3 Conv layers followed by linear layers) for CIFAR-10 classification. Use data augmentation (random crop, flip).

tasks.title: Mini-Project: Improve CIFAR-10 Model
tasks.description: Experiment with different CNN architectures, hyperparameters (learning rate, batch size), and regularization (dropout, weight decay) to achieve >75% test accuracy.

tasks.title: Learn Embeddings & RNN/LSTM Modules
tasks.description: Study nn.Embedding, RNN, LSTM, GRU. Understand packing padded sequences for variable-length inputs.

tasks.title: Implement a Sentiment Analysis Model
tasks.description: Build an LSTM-based model for binary sentiment classification (e.g., on IMDB reviews). Use embeddings, handle text preprocessing.

tasks.title: Mini-Project: Train on IMDB Dataset
tasks.description: Train your sentiment model. Use DataLoader with collate_fn for batching. Track training/validation accuracy, aim for >85% test accuracy.

tasks.title: Explore Pretrained Models & Fine-tuning
tasks.description: Learn to load pretrained models (ResNet, BERT) from torchvision/huggingface. Practice freezing layers and fine-tuning on custom datasets.

tasks.title: Fine-tune ResNet for Custom Image Classification
tasks.description: Use a pretrained ResNet18, replace the final layer, and fine-tune on a small custom dataset (e.g., cats vs dogs from Kaggle).

tasks.title: Mini-Project: Deploy Fine-tuned Model as API
tasks.description: Save your fine-tuned model. Create a FastAPI endpoint that loads the model and accepts image uploads, returning predictions. Containerize with Docker.

tasks.title: Model Saving/Loading & TorchScript
tasks.description: Learn different model serialization methods (state_dict, entire model). Convert model to TorchScript for production deployment.

tasks.title: Optimize Inference with ONNX & Quantization
tasks.description: Export a model to ONNX format. Experiment with dynamic quantization to reduce model size and speed up inference.

tasks.title: Mini-Project: Build a CI/CD Pipeline for Model
tasks.description: Set up a Jenkins/GitHub Actions pipeline that trains a simple PyTorch model on code push, runs tests, and deploys the saved model to a cloud storage (simulate with local folder).

tasks.title: Combine PyTorch with LangChain & Vector DBs
tasks.description: Create a custom LangChain tool/agent that uses a PyTorch model for prediction. Integrate with FAISS for retrieval-augmented tasks.

tasks.title: Build an Event-Driven AI Microservice
tasks.description: Create a PyTorch model service that consumes images from an Apache Kafka topic, runs inference, and publishes results to another topic.

tasks.title: Capstone Project: End-to-End AI Pipeline
tasks.description: Build a full pipeline: data ingestion (Kafka), preprocessing (Pandas/PyTorch), model training (PyTorch CNN), deployment (FastAPI+Docker), monitoring (log metrics). Use a small public dataset.

tasks.title: Scikit-learn Core API & Data Preprocessing
tasks.description: Practice using scikit-learn for data splitting (train_test_split), scaling (StandardScaler, MinMaxScaler), encoding (LabelEncoder, OneHotEncoder), and simple models (LinearRegression, LogisticRegression). Load a dataset (e.g., Iris, Boston housing via sklearn.datasets) and preprocess it.

tasks.title: Build a Classification Pipeline
tasks.description: Create a complete classification pipeline using scikit-learn's Pipeline class. Include preprocessing steps and a classifier (e.g., RandomForestClassifier). Evaluate using metrics like accuracy, precision, recall, and confusion matrix.

tasks.title: Mini-Project: Customer Churn Predictor
tasks.description: Use a dataset (e.g., Telco Customer Churn from Kaggle or synthetic data) to build a model predicting churn. Implement full pipeline: load data, handle missing values, encode categorical features, scale numerical features, train a model (e.g., GradientBoostingClassifier), and evaluate performance.

tasks.title: TensorFlow 2.x & Keras API Basics
tasks.description: Install TensorFlow and explore core concepts: tensors, variables, automatic differentiation (GradientTape). Build a simple sequential model using Keras (Dense layers, activation functions). Compile with optimizer, loss, and metrics.

tasks.title: Train a Neural Network for Regression
tasks.description: Build and train a neural network to solve a regression problem (e.g., predict house prices using Boston housing dataset). Use callbacks like EarlyStopping and ModelCheckpoint. Visualize training history (loss vs. epochs).

tasks.title: Mini-Project: MNIST Digit Classifier
tasks.description: Build a convolutional neural network (CNN) using TensorFlow/Keras to classify handwritten digits from the MNIST dataset. Include Conv2D, MaxPooling2D, Flatten, and Dense layers. Achieve >99% accuracy on test set.

tasks.title: PyTorch Tensors, Autograd & NN Module
tasks.description: Learn PyTorch tensor operations, automatic differentiation (autograd), and the nn.Module class. Create a custom neural network module with linear layers and activation functions. Manually implement training loop with loss and optimizer.

tasks.title: Data Loading with DataLoader & Dataset
tasks.description: Use PyTorch's Dataset and DataLoader for efficient data handling. Create a custom Dataset class for a sample dataset (e.g., a CSV). Implement batching, shuffling, and parallel data loading.

tasks.title: Mini-Project: Fashion-MNIST Classifier with PyTorch
tasks.description: Build a neural network (e.g., a simple CNN or multi-layer perceptron) in PyTorch to classify Fashion-MNIST images. Implement full training loop, track loss/accuracy, and save the trained model.

plan.theme: MLflow for Experiment Tracking & Model Management

tasks.title: MLflow Setup & Basic Logging
tasks.description: Install MLflow and start the tracking server locally. Log parameters, metrics, and artifacts from a simple scikit-learn or TensorFlow training script. View results in the MLflow UI.

tasks.title: Model Registry & Deployment
tasks.description: Register a trained model in the MLflow Model Registry. Transition model stages (Staging, Production). Load a registered model for inference. Explore model serving with MLflow.

tasks.title: Mini-Project: End-to-End ML Pipeline with MLflow
tasks.description: Create a complete pipeline: train multiple scikit-learn models (e.g., RandomForest, SVM) on a dataset, log all experiments to MLflow, compare metrics, register the best model, and create a simple Flask/FastAPI endpoint to serve predictions using the registered model.

plan.theme: Advanced TensorFlow: Custom Models & Data Pipelines

tasks.title: TensorFlow Functional API & Custom Layers
tasks.description: Build a model using the Functional API (multiple inputs/outputs, shared layers). Create a custom layer by subclassing tf.keras.layers.Layer. Implement custom training loops with GradientTape for more control.

tasks.title: TFData Pipeline for Performance
tasks.description: Use tf.data.Dataset to create efficient input pipelines from various sources (NumPy arrays, CSV files). Apply transformations (map, shuffle, batch, prefetch). Compare performance with and without tf.data.

tasks.title: Mini-Project: Text Classifier with TensorFlow Hub
tasks.description: Build a text classification model (e.g., sentiment analysis) using a pre-trained text embedding from TensorFlow Hub. Use the Functional API, tf.data for text preprocessing, and train a classifier on a dataset like IMDB reviews.

plan.theme: Advanced PyTorch: Custom Datasets, Transforms & Transfer Learning

tasks.title: Custom Transforms & Data Augmentation
tasks.description: Create custom transforms using torchvision.transforms or by writing callable classes. Apply data augmentation (random crop, flip, color jitter) to image data. Compose transforms into a pipeline.

tasks.title: Transfer Learning with Torchvision Models
tasks.description: Load a pre-trained model from torchvision.models (e.g., ResNet). Freeze early layers, replace the classifier head, and fine-tune on a custom dataset (e.g., a small image classification task).

tasks.title: Mini-Project: Dog Breed Classifier with Transfer Learning
tasks.description: Use a pre-trained CNN (e.g., ResNet50) and fine-tune it on the Stanford Dogs dataset (or a subset). Implement data loading with augmentation, model modification, training, and evaluation. Log experiments to MLflow.

tasks.title: Model Serving with FastAPI/Flask
tasks.description: Create a REST API endpoint using FastAPI or Flask to serve a trained scikit-learn, TensorFlow, or PyTorch model. Accept input data, preprocess it, run inference, and return predictions. Add input validation.

tasks.title: Containerize ML Model with Docker
tasks.description: Write a Dockerfile for the model serving API from task 1. Include all dependencies (Python, libraries, model files). Build the image and run a container locally. Test the endpoint.

tasks.title: Mini-Project: End-to-End ML Microservice
tasks.description: Build a complete system: Train a model (using any framework), log it with MLflow, create a FastAPI service that loads the model from MLflow, containerize it with Docker, and write a simple Kubernetes deployment YAML (or docker-compose) to run it. Optionally, add a CI/CD step (e.g., GitHub Action) to build the image.

tasks.title: Scikit-learn Core API & Data Preprocessing
tasks.description: Study scikit-learn's fit/predict/transform API. Practice using sklearn.preprocessing (StandardScaler, OneHotEncoder) and sklearn.model_selection (train_test_split, cross_val_score) with a dataset like Iris or Titanic.

tasks.title: Train & Evaluate Classic ML Models
tasks.description: Implement and compare LogisticRegression, RandomForestClassifier, and GradientBoostingClassifier on a classification dataset. Use metrics like accuracy, precision, recall, and generate a confusion matrix.

tasks.title: Mini-Project: Build a Customer Churn Predictor
tasks.description: Using a dataset (e.g., Telco Customer Churn), build an end-to-end pipeline: load data, preprocess features, train a classifier, evaluate performance, and save the model with joblib.

tasks.title: TensorFlow 2.x & Keras API Basics
tasks.description: Learn TensorFlow's eager execution and Keras Sequential/Functional API. Create simple models with Dense, Dropout layers. Compile with optimizers (Adam) and losses (categorical_crossentropy).

tasks.title: Train a CNN for Image Classification
tasks.description: Build a Convolutional Neural Network using Conv2D, MaxPooling2D layers. Train on MNIST or CIFAR-10 dataset. Use callbacks like EarlyStopping and ModelCheckpoint.

tasks.title: Mini-Project: Digit Classifier with TensorFlow
tasks.description: Create a web service using FastAPI (leveraging your existing skill) that loads a trained MNIST model. Accept image uploads, preprocess, predict digit, and return JSON result.

tasks.title: PyTorch Tensors, Autograd & NN Module
tasks.description: Practice tensor operations, understand autograd for automatic differentiation. Build a simple neural network using torch.nn.Module, define forward pass, and use torch.optim.

tasks.title: Data Loading with DataLoader & Training Loop
tasks.description: Create a custom Dataset class, use DataLoader for batching. Write a manual training loop with loss calculation, backward pass, and optimizer step.

tasks.title: Mini-Project: Sentiment Analysis with PyTorch
tasks.description: Build a text classifier for IMDB reviews using an Embedding layer and LSTM. Preprocess text, create vocabulary, train model, and evaluate on test set.

tasks.title: Hyperparameter Tuning with GridSearchCV
tasks.description: Perform hyperparameter optimization for a RandomForest or SVM using GridSearchCV and RandomizedSearchCV. Analyze results with cv_results_.

tasks.title: Pipelines & Feature Unions
tasks.description: Create a scikit-learn Pipeline that chains preprocessing (imputation, scaling) and model steps. Use FeatureUnion to combine multiple feature extraction methods.

tasks.title: Mini-Project: Model Comparison Dashboard
tasks.description: Build a Jupyter notebook that loads a dataset, trains 3 different models (e.g., Logistic Regression, Random Forest, XGBoost), compares their performance metrics, and visualizes results with matplotlib.

plan.theme: MLflow for Experiment Tracking & Model Registry

tasks.title: MLflow Setup & Basic Logging
tasks.description: Install MLflow, start tracking server locally. Log parameters, metrics, and artifacts from a simple scikit-learn model training run.

tasks.title: Log Models & Use Model Registry
tasks.description: Log a trained scikit-learn or TensorFlow model to MLflow. Register the model, transition stages (Staging -> Production), and load the model for inference.

tasks.title: Mini-Project: End-to-End ML Pipeline with MLflow
tasks.description: Create a Python script that trains a model on the Boston Housing dataset, logs experiment to MLflow, registers the best model, and creates a Docker container for serving (leveraging your Docker skill).

tasks.title: Custom Layers & Training in TensorFlow
tasks.description: Create a custom layer by subclassing tf.keras.layers.Layer. Implement a custom training loop using tf.GradientTape for more control.

tasks.title: Transfer Learning with PyTorch
tasks.description: Use a pretrained ResNet model from torchvision, freeze early layers, replace classifier head, and fine-tune on a custom dataset.

tasks.title: Mini-Project: Same Model in Both Frameworks
tasks.description: Implement the same neural network architecture (e.g., a 3-layer MLP) for MNIST classification in both TensorFlow and PyTorch. Compare code structure, training loops, and performance.

tasks.title: Model Serving with MLflow & FastAPI
tasks.description: Serve a registered MLflow model as a REST API using MLflow's built-in serving or package it in a FastAPI application. Add input validation and logging.

tasks.title: CI/CD Pipeline for ML Model
tasks.description: Design a Jenkins pipeline (leveraging your CI/CD skill) that triggers on Git push, runs model training tests, and deploys the model if metrics exceed a threshold.

tasks.title: Capstone Mini-Project: Full ML Lifecycle
tasks.description: Build a complete system: train a scikit-learn model on a dataset, track experiment with MLflow, register best model, containerize with Docker, deploy to local Kubernetes (minikube), and create a FastAPI service for inference.

tasks.title: Scikit-learn Core API & Data Preprocessing
tasks.description: Study Scikit-learn's fit/predict/transform API. Practice using sklearn.preprocessing (StandardScaler, OneHotEncoder) and sklearn.model_selection (train_test_split, cross_val_score) on a sample dataset (e.g., Iris or Boston housing).

tasks.title: Train & Evaluate Classic ML Models
tasks.description: Implement and compare at least three classic ML models (e.g., LogisticRegression, RandomForestClassifier, SVM) on a classification dataset (e.g., from sklearn.datasets). Evaluate using accuracy, precision, recall, and confusion matrix.

tasks.title: Mini-Project: Build a Classic ML Pipeline
tasks.description: Create an end-to-end pipeline: load data, preprocess, train a model (e.g., RandomForest), tune hyperparameters using GridSearchCV, evaluate, and save the model using pickle/joblib. Use a dataset like the Titanic survival dataset.

tasks.title: TensorFlow 2.x Basics & Keras API
tasks.description: Learn TensorFlow tensors, variables, and automatic differentiation. Practice building sequential and functional Keras models (Dense, Dropout layers). Use tf.data.Dataset for input pipelines.

tasks.title: Train a Neural Network for Classification
tasks.description: Build and train a fully connected neural network on MNIST or Fashion-MNIST. Implement training loops with callbacks (EarlyStopping, ModelCheckpoint). Visualize training history (loss/accuracy).

tasks.title: Mini-Project: Image Classifier with CNN
tasks.description: Build a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) using TensorFlow/Keras for CIFAR-10 image classification. Include Conv2D, MaxPooling2D, and Dropout layers. Achieve >70% test accuracy.

tasks.title: PyTorch Tensors, Autograd & NN Module
tasks.description: Learn PyTorch tensor operations, automatic differentiation (autograd), and the torch.nn module. Build a simple neural network using nn.Sequential and custom nn.Module classes.

tasks.title: Custom Training Loop & DataLoaders
tasks.description: Write a custom training loop (forward pass, loss calculation, backward pass, optimizer step). Use torch.utils.data.DataLoader with a custom Dataset class for batching and shuffling.

tasks.title: Mini-Project: Text Classifier with PyTorch
tasks.description: Build a text classification model for sentiment analysis (e.g., on IMDB reviews). Use an embedding layer (nn.Embedding) followed by LSTM or a simple feedforward network. Use torchtext for data loading.

tasks.title: Transfer Learning with TensorFlow Hub/PyTorch Hub
tasks.description: Practice transfer learning: load a pre-trained model (e.g., ResNet, BERT) from TF Hub or Torch Hub. Freeze base layers, replace the head, and fine-tune on a custom dataset (e.g., cats vs dogs).

tasks.title: Implement a Custom Model Architecture
tasks.description: Design and implement a custom neural network architecture (e.g., a siamese network or a custom CNN block) in both TensorFlow/Keras and PyTorch to compare the frameworks.

tasks.title: Mini-Project: Fine-tune a Pre-trained Model
tasks.description: Fine-tune a pre-trained vision model (e.g., MobileNetV2 from TF Hub) on a small custom image dataset (collect 100-200 images per class). Deploy the model as a FastAPI endpoint that returns predictions.

plan.theme: MLflow for Experiment Tracking & Model Management

tasks.title: MLflow Setup & Basic Logging
tasks.description: Install MLflow and start the tracking server locally. Log parameters, metrics, and artifacts from a simple Scikit-learn or TensorFlow training script. View results in the MLflow UI.

tasks.title: Model Registry & Versioning
tasks.description: Register a trained model in the MLflow Model Registry. Create model versions, transition stages (Staging, Production), and load a specific model version for inference.

tasks.title: Mini-Project: End-to-End ML Pipeline with MLflow
tasks.description: Build a complete pipeline: train multiple Scikit-learn models (e.g., different hyperparameters) on a dataset, log all experiments to MLflow, select the best model, register it, and create a Dockerized inference service that loads the model from MLflow.

tasks.title: Model Serving with TensorFlow Serving / TorchServe
tasks.description: Export a trained TensorFlow model as SavedModel and serve it using TensorFlow Serving. Alternatively, export a PyTorch model and serve with TorchServe. Send inference requests via REST/gRPC.

tasks.title: Build a Scalable Inference Microservice
tasks.description: Create a FastAPI microservice that loads a trained model (from MLflow or local), exposes a /predict endpoint, and includes health checks, logging, and input validation. Containerize it with Docker.

tasks.title: Mini-Project: Event-Driven Model Inference
tasks.description: Build a system where a producer sends data to Apache Kafka, a consumer loads a model and performs batch inference on the stream, and results are stored in PostgreSQL. Use your existing Kafka and DB skills.

tasks.title: Review & Compare Frameworks
tasks.description: Create a comparison table of TensorFlow vs PyTorch vs Scikit-learn for different use cases (research, production, ease of use). Write a summary of when to use each.

tasks.title: Design a Full ML System Architecture
tasks.description: Design an architecture diagram for a real-time ML system that includes data ingestion, preprocessing, model training (with MLflow tracking), serving (with Kubernetes), and monitoring. Leverage your scalability and event-driven architecture knowledge.

tasks.title: Capstone Mini-Project: End-to-End ML Application
tasks.description: Build a complete application: train a model (using any of the 4 focus skills), track with MLflow, containerize the training and serving components, deploy with Kubernetes manifests, and set up a CI/CD pipeline with Jenkins/Git to retrain on new data.

tasks.title: Scikit-learn Core API & Data Preprocessing
tasks.description: Learn Scikit-learn's fit/predict/transform API. Practice data loading, splitting (train/test), scaling (StandardScaler), encoding (LabelEncoder, OneHotEncoder), and imputation using sklearn.preprocessing and sklearn.impute.

tasks.title: Build & Evaluate Classic ML Models
tasks.description: Implement and compare Logistic Regression, Random Forest, and SVM classifiers on a dataset like Iris or Digits. Use metrics (accuracy, precision, recall, F1) and cross-validation (cross_val_score).

tasks.title: Mini-Project: End-to-end ML Pipeline with Scikit-learn
tasks.description: Build a complete pipeline: load a dataset (e.g., Titanic from seaborn or sklearn.datasets.fetch_california_housing), preprocess features, train a model (e.g., RandomForestRegressor), evaluate with RMSE/MAE, and save the model using joblib.

tasks.title: TensorFlow 2.x Basics: Tensors, Layers, Models
tasks.description: Learn TensorFlow tensors, operations, and automatic differentiation. Build a Sequential model with Dense layers, compile with optimizer/loss, and understand training loops using model.fit().

tasks.title: Implement a Feedforward Neural Network
tasks.description: Create a neural network for classification (e.g., MNIST digits). Use tf.keras.layers (Dense, Dropout, Flatten), compile with Adam optimizer and sparse_categorical_crossentropy, train, and evaluate accuracy.

tasks.title: Mini-Project: Image Classifier with CNN using TensorFlow
tasks.description: Build a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) using tf.keras.layers.Conv2D, MaxPooling2D, etc. Train on CIFAR-10 or a subset, visualize training history, and make predictions on test images.

tasks.title: PyTorch Tensors, Autograd, and NN Module
tasks.description: Learn PyTorch tensor creation, operations, and automatic differentiation (autograd). Build a custom neural network by subclassing nn.Module, define forward pass, and use nn.Linear, nn.ReLU.

tasks.title: Train a Model with PyTorch: DataLoader & Training Loop
tasks.description: Create a Dataset and DataLoader for batching. Write a manual training loop: forward pass, loss calculation (nn.CrossEntropyLoss), backward pass (loss.backward()), and optimizer step (torch.optim.SGD).

tasks.title: Mini-Project: Text Classifier with PyTorch and NLP Basics
tasks.description: Build a text classification model using a simple embedding layer (nn.Embedding) and linear layers. Preprocess text data (tokenization, vocabulary), train on a small dataset (e.g., AG News subset), and evaluate.

plan.theme: MLflow for Experiment Tracking & Model Management

tasks.title: MLflow Setup and Basic Logging
tasks.description: Install MLflow, start the tracking server locally. Learn to log parameters, metrics, and artifacts. Experiment with mlflow.start_run(), log_param(), log_metric(), and log_artifact().

tasks.title: Log Scikit-learn and TensorFlow Models to MLflow
tasks.description: Use mlflow.sklearn.autolog() and mlflow.tensorflow.autolog() during model training. Log a trained Scikit-learn model and a TensorFlow Keras model, then load them back for inference.

tasks.title: Mini-Project: End-to-end ML Pipeline with MLflow Tracking
tasks.description: Create a script that trains multiple Scikit-learn models (e.g., Logistic Regression, Random Forest) on a dataset, logs each experiment to MLflow with different hyperparameters, compares metrics in the UI, and registers the best model.

tasks.title: Build a FastAPI Service for Model Inference
tasks.description: Create a FastAPI app that loads a saved Scikit-learn or TensorFlow model. Define a POST endpoint that accepts input data, runs prediction, and returns results. Test with curl or Postman.

tasks.title: Containerize ML Model with Docker
tasks.description: Write a Dockerfile for the FastAPI model service. Include dependencies (requirements.txt), copy model file, expose port, and set up CMD. Build the image and run a container locally.

tasks.title: Mini-Project: ML Pipeline with MLflow Model Registry & API
tasks.description: Train a model, log it to MLflow, and register it in the Model Registry. Then, build a separate FastAPI service that fetches the latest production model from the registry and serves predictions.

tasks.title: Compare TensorFlow vs PyTorch for a Custom Task
tasks.description: Implement the same neural network architecture (e.g., a simple CNN or RNN) in both TensorFlow and PyTorch for a small dataset. Compare code structure, training loops, and ease of debugging.

tasks.title: Build a Recommendation System with Scikit-learn
tasks.description: Create a collaborative filtering or content-based recommendation model using Scikit-learn's NearestNeighbors or matrix factorization. Test on a dataset like MovieLens small.

tasks.title: Capstone Project: Full ML Lifecycle with All Tools
tasks.description: End-to-end project: Use Scikit-learn for preprocessing and baseline model, PyTorch/TensorFlow for a neural network, track experiments in MLflow, register the best model, and create a Dockerized FastAPI service that uses the model. Simulate a CI/CD trigger.
